title: Riverfront Holdings v. Greenacre Estates — specific performance of land purchase
relief_sought: Order compelling conveyance of Lot 12 per purchase agreement
Or alternatively money damages for breach
Injunctive relief preventing conveyance to third party
key_facts: Purchase agreement dated June 1, 2025 identifies Lot 12 by metes and bounds survey.
Plaintiff tendered full purchase price on closing date; defendant refused to close.
Defendant entered contract to sell same parcel to a third buyer for higher price.

contract_clauses.name: Property description
contract_clauses.text: Seller agrees to convey Lot 12, Greenacre Subdivision, as depicted on Exhibit A survey.
